description: A ground-level photograph of an agricultural landscape in Almeria, Andalusia, Spain, depicting the infrastructure of greenhouses. The image shows a large, flat, dry field covered by a dense grid of vertical poles and horizontal supports, forming the skeletal structure for extensive protected cultivation. A dark, mesh fence or netting is visible in the foreground. The background features a clear blue sky and distant hills or mountains. The photo is attributed to "© Eurostat LUCAS 2009" in the bottom left corner.
